Blog

First Notes on Owning the Site Again

Why moving off a page builder matters, and what a file-driven portfolio/blog setup makes possible.

Mar 27, 2026
  • Website
  • Workflow

The portfolio pages and the blog serve different jobs, so separating them inside the same static site feels like the right balance.

Projects need structure and consistency. The blog can be looser. It can hold process thoughts, short notes, and things that are useful to remember later even when they are not polished enough to become a full case study.

That separation is the real upgrade here, not just the tech stack.

Gary Yang

Programmer, tech artist, and computer graphics engineer building real-time tools, rendering experiments, and interactive systems.

  • LinkedIn
